title: hierochloe dregei
intro: Hierochloe dregei, also known as Veldt Grass or Sweetgrass, is a type of grass native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hierochloe dregei include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. In traditional medicine, Hierochloe dregei is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to calm the mind and body.
